name: gadgethumans-api-hub-mcp
summary: MCP server wrapping 22 utility + AI-powered APIs — QR codes, passwords, UUIDs, hashing, base64, lorem ipsum, JSON, colors, email verify, IP geo, timestamps, OG metadata, crypto, FX, DNS, RSS, holidays, plus AI reasoning tools: analyze URL, research topics, compare items, generate SEO metadata, extract contacts
